lccdd.comment:
These are used by ddsim, the region where we store all secondaries
For now they are forced to be symmetric, and we cover up to the start of the backward ECAL. (this means in the forward region we stop in the middle of the RICH).

define.comment: These constants are used directly by the *Geant4TCUserParticleHandler* (default in ddsim)

lccdd.comment: This volume is used by the *Geant4TCUserParticleHandler* (default in the latest npsim)

parallelworld_volume.name: tracking_volume
parallelworld_volume.comment: We first build a tube using the legacy parameters
